results.title: KEM Medical College sends MBBS student Sejal Pawar on 15-day leave amid Pranit More comedy show controversy
results.description: Following a preliminary inquiry into a viral stand-up comedy clip, KEM Hospital and Medical College has barred MBBS student Sejal Pawar from campus for 15 days and ordered a detailed investigation into the matter.

results.title: How to participate in the 'No Kings' event in Salem this weekend
results.description: Salem Region Indivisible is hosting a "No Kings" event watch party on June 14. Here's what to know.

results.title: Amid Don 3 row, Saif Ali Khan says Farhan Akhtar ‘was born to direct’
results.description: Saif Ali Khan praised Farhan Akhtar's discipline and commitment, saying there was no tension on the sets of Dil Chahta Hai.
